name: composite-dispatch accepts the --profile flag as part of its routed-path configuration interface
command:
printf 'name: app
' > config.yaml && printf 'name: t
rules: {}
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file config.yaml --profile p.yaml >/dev/null 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -ne 2 ] && echo dispatch-accepts-profile 1>&2
